mission.title: Install and Configure K8sgpt on Kubernetes
mission.description: K8sGPT is a powerful tool that enhances Kubernetes management by scanning clusters and diagnosing issues using AI. Installing K8sGPT allows you to leverage AI capabilities to improve your Kubernetes operations.

steps.title: Add the K8sGPT Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the official K8sGPT Helm chart repository to your Helm configuration with the following command:
```bash
helm repo add k8sgpt https://ghcr.io/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt/charts
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install K8sGPT using Helm
steps.description:
Install K8sGPT in a new namespace called 'k8sgpt' with the specified resource limits and environment variables:
```bash
helm install k8sgpt k8sgpt/k8sgpt --namespace k8sgpt --create-namespace --set deployment.image.repository=ghcr.io/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt --set deployment.image.tag=v0.4.30 --set deployment.resources.limits.cpu=1 --set deployment.resources.limits.memory=512Mi --set deployment.resources.requests.cpu=0.2 --set deployment.resources.requests.memory=156Mi
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check if the K8sGPT pod is running successfully:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n k8sgpt
```

steps.title: Configure the OpenAI secret
steps.description:
Create a Kubernetes secret to store your OpenAI token. Replace `<your-openai-token>` with your actual token:
```bash
kubectl create secret generic k8sgpt-secret --from-literal=secretKey=<your-openai-token> --namespace k8sgpt
```

steps.title: Access K8sGPT service
steps.description:
Port-forward the K8sGPT service to access it locally:
```bash
kubectl port-forward service/k8sgpt --namespace k8sgpt 8080:8080
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation will have the K8sGPT pod running in the 'k8sgpt' namespace, and you will be able to access it via port 8080 on your local machine. Ensure that the OpenAI token is correctly configured in the Kubernetes secret.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add k8sgpt https://ghcr.io/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt/charts
helm repo update

helm install k8sgpt k8sgpt/k8sgpt --namespace k8sgpt --create-namespace --set deployment.image.repository=ghcr.io/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt --set deployment.image.tag=v0.4.30 --set deployment.resources.limits.cpu=1 --set deployment.resources.limits.memory=512Mi --set deployment.resources.requests.cpu=0.2 --set deployment.resources.requests.memory=156Mi
kubectl create secret generic k8sgpt-secret --from-literal=secretKey=<your-openai-token> --namespace k8sgpt

prerequisites.description: You need a Kubernetes cluster and have Helm and kubectl installed on your machine.
